title: Avoid Field Injection: Use Constructor Injection Instead
description: Field injection seems like a tidy way to get your classes what they need to do their jobs, but it's really a NullPointerException waiting to happen unless all your class constructors are private. Instead @Inject should be moved to the constructor and the fields required as constructor parameters.
recommendation: Use constructor injection instead of field injection
impact: Improves code quality and security by reducing the risk of NullPointerExceptions

checks.message: Rule: Avoid Field Injection: Use Constructor Injection Instead
